assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the reference values exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 show all Jira fields preserved exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. All match the reference values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 7: 'trustify-backend | Preserved (existing) | Row kept exactly as-is...'; line 8: 'trustify-ui | Added (new) | New row added...'; lines 12-13: Jira 'Status: Fully preserved (no changes)'; lines 26-29: Code Intelligence elements individually marked as 'Preserved (existing)' or 'Added (new)'. The log explicitly distinguishes preserved vs. added entries throughout.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: 'serena_backend -- Already configured in Repository Registry. No action needed.' and line 13: 'serena_ui -- Newly discovered. Not present in Repository Registry. Needs to be added.' Both conditions are explicitly stated.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-21 preserve the naming convention: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Lines 25-29 preserve the serena_backend find_symbol example verbatim. Line 33 preserves the serena_backend limitation: '`serena_backend`: rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'. The only addition is line 34: '`serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
